  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Absaloms un
wiſſi Israēta Wihri: Usaja ta Ar-
kitera Padohms irr labbaks ne
ka Akitoweſa Padohins. Bet
tas KUNGS likke ta notikt/ ka
Akitoweſa labbajs Padohms ktua
isnihzinaths/ ka tas KUNGS
Nelainibu pahr Absalomu westu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Usajus fazzija us teem
Preestereem Zadaku un Abjata-
ru: Schà un ta irr Akitowels
Absalomam nn Israēta Wezza-
jecim Padohmu dewis/ un tcha
un ta esnim es Padohmu dewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un nu fuhtast drihs/ un
dohdeet Dahwidam Sinnu/ faz-
zidant: Ne paleez zaur Nafti
Tuknefes Klaijumds/ bet eij drihs
pahri/ ka tas Rehnisch ne tohp
aprihts ar wiſſeem Landim/ kas
pee winna irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Jonatans nn Akima-
az stahweja pee tahs Akkas Ro-
gel. Un weena Meita gahje/ un
fazzija teem to/ tad nogahje tee/
un stahstija to tam Rehniram
Dahwidam/ jo tee ne drihſteja
Pilsfahta nahkt/ un rahditees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un weens Puizis redseja
tohs/ un pasazzija to Absalo-
man/ bet tee gahje abbi divi
steigdamees/ un nahze kahdaWih-
ra Namma eekſch Bakurim/ tam
bija Akka fawa Pagalmē/ un tee
nokahpe eerich tahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ta Seewa nehme/
isplattija weenut Wahku p
tahs Akkas Zaurunnu/ un ka
ja Putrainus us to/ ta pal-
schi Leeta nepasihta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Absaloma Ka-
pee tahs Seewas Namma n
ze/ tad fazzija tee: Kur irr N
mādz un Jonatans? un ta E
wa fazzija us teem: Tee irr p
fcho Strautixu gahjuschi/ un
tee tohs bij meklejschi/ un ne
radutchi/ greesehs tee atpak-
us Jerusalemi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un pehz kad tee bij nog
juschi/ iskahpe tee no tahs Ak-
nn gahje/ nn patazzija to t
Rehniram Dahwidam/ un
tazzija us Dahwidu: Zelleete
un eite drihs pahr to Uhdeni/
scha un ta irr Akitowels p
jums Padohmu dewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad zehlehs Dahwi-
un wiſſi Landis/ kas pee wi-
bija/ un gahje pahr to Jard-
lihds patt Gatfmai/ un ne we-
truhke/ kas ne buhtu pahrga-
pahr to Jardanu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Akitowels re-
ja/ ka pehz winna Padohma-
ktua darrihts/ tad apted-
wisch fawn Chseli/ un zehle-
un gahje us fawn Namnu fa-
Pilsfahtā/ nn apkehpe fo-
Namnu/ un pakahrahs/ ta-
mirre wiſsch/ un itappe fo-
Tehwa Kappa aprakts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Dahwidg nahze
Mānam/ bet Absaloms g
"
    }
